free_text: Photofission product yields of 238U and 239Pu with
22-MeV bremsstrahlung
Two n-type coaxial HPGe detectors with the
relative efficiency of 40%. The center-line of both
detectors was perpendicular to the beam line.
Activation method was used. Delayed gamma
rays from photofission products were measured between
linac pulses during a 45 min measurement. After
cooling period long lived products were measured.
Bremsstrahlung photons were produced by 22 MeV
electron linac. The repetition frequency of linac was
10 Hz with pulse width of 4 mu-s.
No source of uncertainties given
Compiled by S.H.
Photofission product yields of 238U based on high
energy delayed gamma rays
Natural uranium plate with thickness of 18.9 g/cm2
and mass approximately 2 kg.
Data taken from tab.1 of the reference
Photofission product yields of 239Pu determined using
the list-mode system (time x energy) to identify
photofission products according to half-lives

thickness of 0.95g/cm2 and total mass of 3g.
